name: Australian Sticky Date Pudding
recipeIngredient: Plus extra butter to coat the pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan with butter.
3. In a large bowl, combine chopped dates and sugar until well mixed.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in flour, salt, vanilla, baking soda, and baking powder.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Turn off the oven and let the pudding cool in the pan for 10 minutes before serving.
